# Agent A — vyre-foundation

## Ownership (sole editor of these paths)

- `vyre-foundation/**` (everything in the new crate)
- `vyre-spec/src/**` (additions only: absorbs `IntrinsicDescriptor`)
- `vyre-core/src/ir/**` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/ir.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/optimizer/**` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/optimizer.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/lower.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/match_result.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/ops/cpu_op.rs`, `vyre-core/src/ops/cpu_references.rs`
  (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/ops/metadata.rs` (deletes after move — `IntrinsicDescriptor`
  specifically; other contents deleted if vyre-spec already holds them)

### Forbidden paths (Agent B or C owns these)

- `vyre-core/src/dialect/**`
- `vyre-core/src/ops/**` except the four files listed above
- `vyre-core/src/backend.rs` + `backend/**`
- `vyre-core/src/pipeline.rs`
- `vyre-core/src/routing.rs` + `routing/**`
- `vyre-core/src/diagnostics.rs`
- `vyre-core/src/error.rs`
- `vyre-core/src/cert.rs` + `cert/**`
- `vyre-core/src/introspection.rs`, `test_migration.rs`, `bin/**`, `fuzz/**`
- `vyre-wgpu/**`, `backends/**`
- `vyre-reference/**`, `conform/**`, `ops-facades/**`

### Shared files (edit with rebase-on-land contract)

- `vyre-core/src/lib.rs` — Agent A appends its re-export lines for the
  symbols it moved and deletes its `pub mod X;` declarations for
  modules it emptied. If rebase conflicts with B/C on this file, the
  conflict is mechanical (disjoint line additions/deletions) — resolve
  by keeping all three agents' edits.
- `vyre-core/Cargo.toml` — Agent A adds `vyre-foundation = { workspace = true }`
  as a dep if not already added. Mechanical merge.

## Tasks (in order)

### Task A.1 — Move `IntrinsicDescriptor` into vyre-spec

Location today: `vyre-core/src/ops/metadata.rs` (the `IntrinsicDescriptor`
type, `Backend`, `BackendKind`, `Category`, `Compose`, `ExtensionBackend`).

Acceptance: `IntrinsicDescriptor` lives in `vyre-spec/src/intrinsic_descriptor.rs`
(note: `vyre-spec/src/intrinsic_table.rs` already exists, this is adjacent).
Re-export from `vyre-spec/src/lib.rs`. Old path in
`vyre-core/src/ops/metadata.rs` deletes. Every importer updates to
`vyre_spec::IntrinsicDescriptor`.

If `Backend`, `BackendKind`, `Category`, `Compose`, `ExtensionBackend`
are also broadly imported, move them alongside. If any are
driver-specific (e.g., `ExtensionBackend` implies a `VyreBackend` trait
reference), leave them in `vyre-core/src/ops/` for Agent B to claim.

### Task A.2 — Fix 7 reverse imports in `vyre-core/src/ir/transform/compiler/`

Files:
- `dominator_tree.rs:15` — `use crate::ops::AlgebraicLaw;` → `use vyre_spec::AlgebraicLaw;`
- `typed_arena.rs:13` — same
- `dataflow_fixpoint.rs:14` — same
- `recursive_descent.rs:13` — same
- `string_interner.rs:14` — `use crate::ops::{AlgebraicLaw, IntrinsicDescriptor};`
  → `use vyre_spec::{AlgebraicLaw, IntrinsicDescriptor};`
- `visitor_walk.rs:13` — `use crate::ops::AlgebraicLaw;` → `use vyre_spec::AlgebraicLaw;`
- `ir/engine/token_match_filter.rs:9` — **delete this file entirely**. It
  is a thin re-export of `ops::string::tokenize_gpu::TokenType`. Agent C
  recreates an equivalent inside `vyre-ops::pattern` if needed.

After this task, `grep "use crate::ops::" vyre-core/src/ir/` returns zero.

### Task A.3 — Create vyre-foundation tree

`git mv` each subtree from vyre-core into vyre-foundation:

| Source | Destination |
|---|---|
| `vyre-core/src/ir/model/` | `vyre-foundation/src/ir/` |
| `vyre-core/src/ir/visit/` | `vyre-foundation/src/visit/` |
| `vyre-core/src/ir/serial/` | `vyre-foundation/src/serial/` |
| `vyre-core/src/ir/validate/` | `vyre-foundation/src/validate/` |
| `vyre-core/src/ir/memory_model.rs` | `vyre-foundation/src/memory_model.rs` |
| `vyre-core/src/ir/extension.rs` | `vyre-foundation/src/extension.rs` |
| `vyre-core/src/ir/engine/` | `vyre-foundation/src/engine/` |
| `vyre-core/src/ir/transform/` | `vyre-foundation/src/transform/` |
| `vyre-core/src/optimizer/` | `vyre-foundation/src/optimizer/` |
| `vyre-core/src/optimizer.rs` | `vyre-foundation/src/optimizer.rs` (aggregator) |
| `vyre-core/src/lower.rs` | `vyre-foundation/src/lower.rs` |
| `vyre-core/src/match_result.rs` | `vyre-foundation/src/match_result.rs` |
| `vyre-core/src/ops/cpu_op.rs` | `vyre-foundation/src/cpu_op.rs` |
| `vyre-core/src/ops/cpu_references.rs` | `vyre-foundation/src/cpu_references.rs` |

Delete `vyre-core/src/ir/` empty directory.
Delete `vyre-core/src/ir.rs` (aggregator file, content moves into
`vyre-foundation/src/lib.rs`).

### Task A.4 — Rewrite vyre-foundation/src/lib.rs

Should look like the current `vyre-core/src/ir.rs` but with paths
adjusted for the new crate layout. Public re-exports:

```rust
pub mod ir {
    pub use crate::ir_inner::model;
    pub use crate::ir_inner::model::arena::{ArenaProgram, ExprArena, ExprRef};
    pub use crate::ir_inner::model::expr::{Expr, ExprNode, Ident};
    pub use crate::ir_inner::model::types::OpId;
    pub use crate::ir_inner::model::node::{Node, NodeExtension};
    pub use crate::ir_inner::model::program::{
        BufferDecl, CacheLocality, MemoryHints, MemoryKind, Program,
    };
    pub use crate::ir_inner::model::types::{
        AtomicOp, BinOp, BufferAccess, Convention, DataType,
        DataTypeSizeBytes, OpSignature, UnOp,
    };
    pub use crate::serial::text;
    pub use crate::transform::inline::{inline_calls, inline_calls_with_resolver, OpResolver};
    pub use crate::transform::optimize::{cse, dce, optimize};
    pub use crate::validate::depth::{
        LimitState, DEFAULT_MAX_CALL_DEPTH, DEFAULT_MAX_NESTING_DEPTH, DEFAULT_MAX_NODE_COUNT,
    };
    pub use crate::validate::validate::validate;
    pub use crate::validate::validation_error::ValidationError;
}

pub mod memory_model;
pub use memory_model::MemoryOrdering;

mod ir_inner {
    pub mod model;
}
pub mod serial;
pub mod transform;
pub mod validate;
pub mod visit;
pub mod extension;
pub mod engine;
pub mod optimizer;
pub mod lower;
pub mod match_result;
pub mod cpu_op;
pub mod cpu_references;
```

Adjust as needed so every `use vyre_foundation::X` path that existed as
`use vyre::X` (the legacy import) resolves identically.

In `vyre-core/src/lib.rs`:

- Delete `pub mod optimizer;`
- Delete `pub mod lower;`

Every downstream consumer that imports `vyre::ir::Expr` continues to
resolve to the same type, now routed through `vyre-foundation`.

### Task A.6 — Add vyre-foundation as a dep of vyre-core

Edit `vyre-core/Cargo.toml` (append to existing `[dependencies]` block):
```toml
vyre-foundation = { workspace = true }
```

### Task A.7 — Handle `compiler_primitives/wgsl/*.wgsl` shader assets

Six `.wgsl` files live under `vyre-core/src/ir/transform/compiler/wgsl/`:
`dataflow_fixpoint.wgsl`, `dominator_tree.wgsl`, `recursive_descent.wgsl`,
`string_interner.wgsl`, `typed_arena.wgsl`, `visitor_walk.wgsl`. These
are `include_str!`-ed by their sibling `.rs` files.

**Law B forbids `.wgsl` asset files in vyre-foundation.** Resolution:

1. DO NOT move the `.wgsl` files to `vyre-foundation`. Agent B accepts
   them under `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/shaders/compiler_primitives/`.
2. The `.rs` files DO move to `vyre-foundation/src/transform/compiler/`
   (they define the CPU reference for each primitive — that's foundation).
3. Replace every `include_str!("wgsl/foo.wgsl")` call site with a
   `todo_at_v0_7::compile_time_panic!("wgsl source moved to vyre-driver-wgpu; \
   GPU path will return BackendError until v0.7 NagaBuilder migration")`
   — NO, that violates LAW 1. Instead:
4. Define a trait `CompilerPrimitiveShaderProvider` in
   `vyre-foundation/src/transform/compiler/shader_provider.rs` with one
   method `fn wgsl_source(op: &str) -> Option<&'static str>;`.
5. `vyre-driver-wgpu` implements this trait, registering via
   `inventory::submit!` with the shader source `include_str!`-ed from
   its own `shaders/compiler_primitives/` directory.
6. The `.rs` call sites in foundation call the trait through the
   registry. No assets in foundation, no LAW B violation, no stubs,
   GPU path still works.

**Specific additions to the move list in Task A.3:**
- Keep `vyre-core/src/ir/transform/compiler/wgsl/*.wgsl` IN PLACE —
  Agent B's Task B.new2 moves them to `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/shaders/`.
- Do NOT `git mv` the `wgsl/` subdirectory.
- Move the `.rs` files in `compiler/` to `vyre-foundation/src/transform/compiler/`
  but strip the `include_str!` lines — replace with calls through the
  new `CompilerPrimitiveShaderProvider` trait.

If coordination with Agent B's shader-acceptance work is required,
leave a note at `.internals/coordination/A-to-B-compiler-shaders.md`
listing the 6 filenames.

### Task A.8 — Wire-format byte-layout preservation gate

Wire format v1 is the tightest frozen contract. Every existing on-disk
`.vir0` file, every signed conformance certificate, every disk-cached
pipeline depends on byte-identical output.

Before committing: capture a byte snapshot of canonical program
round-trips from the current codebase (HEAD). After moving `serial/`:
regenerate the same snapshot and diff. One byte of divergence is a
semver-major event; Agent A must NOT commit.

Specific gate:
```
# Before any moves, from HEAD:
cargo test -p vyre --test wire_format_corpus -- --nocapture \
  2>&1 | tee target/wire-pre.log

# After Task A.3 moves complete:
cargo test -p vyre-foundation --test wire_format_corpus -- --nocapture \
  2>&1 | tee target/wire-post.log

diff target/wire-pre.log target/wire-post.log
# Must be empty (modulo timestamps, paths). If non-empty in the hex
# dump section, the move is wrong.
```

If a corpus test doesn't exist, Agent A creates one: loads a fixed set
of 20+ hand-authored Programs, encodes each to wire bytes, hex-dumps,
and asserts against a committed golden file at
`vyre-foundation/tests/wire_format_golden.bin`.

### Task A.9 — Compile gate

```
cargo build -p vyre-foundation                    # must succeed
cargo build -p vyre --no-default-features         # must succeed
cargo build -p vyre-wgpu                          # must succeed (or vyre-driver-wgpu if Agent B has renamed)
cargo test -p vyre-foundation                     # must pass
cargo test -p vyre                                # must pass at pre-restructure level
cargo test --test wire_format_corpus              # must pass (see Task A.8)
```

Dependency audit: `cargo tree -p vyre-foundation --no-default-features`
must show deps limited to `vyre-spec`, `vyre-macros`, `serde`,
`serde_json`, `thiserror`, `tracing`, `rustc-hash`, `smallvec`,
`blake3`, `bytemuck`, `inventory`, and their transitives.

Specifically must NOT appear in the tree: `naga`, `wgpu`, `wgpu-hal`,
`wgpu-core`, `ash`, `toml` (toml is driver-tier, for dialect TOML
loading; foundation shouldn't need it).

### Task A.10 — Fix lasting structural diseases that live in foundation

These are correctness issues the prior AGENT1 plan called for but didn't
fully land. Now landed as part of the foundation extraction.

**A.10.1 — Wire format rejects `Expr::Opaque` and `Node::Opaque`**

Current: `DataType::Opaque`, `BinOp::Opaque`, `UnOp::Opaque`, and
`RuleCondition::Opaque` round-trip (tag 0x80 encoding landed). But the
outer `Expr::Opaque(...)` and `Node::Opaque(...)` variants — the most
common extension points — are still rejected by the encoder or decoder.

Fix:
- Assign wire tag `0x80` for `Expr::Opaque` in `vyre-foundation/src/serial/wire/tags/expr_tag.rs`.
- Assign wire tag `0x80` for `Node::Opaque` in the node tag table.
- Encode path: `encode::put_expr` and `encode::put_nodes` handle the
  opaque case by writing `tag_0x80 || u32 extension_id || payload_len || payload_bytes`.
- Decode path: `decode::from_wire::read_expr` / `read_node` resolve the
  extension_id through the frozen inventory resolver and hand the
  payload to the registered deserializer.
- Round-trip proptest asserting `decode(encode(opaque_expr)) == opaque_expr`
  and `decode(encode(opaque_node)) == opaque_node`.
- Fingerprint stability: opaque nodes participate in program hashing
  the same way intrinsic nodes do.

**A.10.2 — `RuleCondition` still a closed enum in vyre-spec**

The session-failure memo said this landed at `0315fa8a52`, but verify:
`grep "RuleCondition::Opaque" vyre-spec/src/` must return a match. If
it doesn't, add the `Opaque(Arc<dyn RuleConditionExt>)` variant with
PartialEq/Hash compare on extension_id. Frozen-trait snapshot update
at `docs/frozen-traits/RuleCondition.md`.

**A.10.3 — `ExprVisitor` / `NodeVisitor` bridge exists but compiler transforms ignore it**

Task A.1 restored the visitor traits. The 7 reverse-import fixes in
Task A.2 touched those compiler-primitive files but did not convert
their internal `match` arms to visitor dispatch. Finish the migration:

For each of `dominator_tree.rs`, `typed_arena.rs`, `dataflow_fixpoint.rs`,
`recursive_descent.rs`, `string_interner.rs`, `visitor_walk.rs` in
`vyre-foundation/src/transform/compiler/`, and for
`impl_inlinectx.rs`, `impl_calleeexpander/primitive.rs`,
`impl_calleeexpander/composition.rs`, `parallelism.rs`, `visit.rs` in
`vyre-foundation/src/transform/{inline,parallelism}/` and for
`impl_exprkey.rs`, `impl_csectx.rs`, `expr_has_effect.rs` in
`vyre-foundation/src/transform/optimize/{cse,dce}/`:

- Replace `match expr { ... _ => ... }` with an `ExprVisitor` impl.
- `visit_opaque(id)` fallback is conservative (bail the optimization or
  preserve the expression untouched — whichever is safe for that pass).
- Replace `match node { ... _ => ... }` with a `NodeVisitor` impl.

After this task, `grep "match \\(expr\\|node\\)" vyre-foundation/src/transform/`
should return zero hits on Expr/Node-typed matches (auxiliary match
statements on sub-types are fine).

**A.10.4 — `NodeLike` trait exported but unused**

`NodeLike` lives in `vyre-foundation/src/ir/` (formerly vyre-core). The
session memo flagged it as zero-usage. Decision required (not deferred):
- If `NodeLike` is a genuine public API that external consumers (surgec,
  pyrograph) might depend on, keep it and add a doctest demonstrating
  minimal use.
- If no consumer references it and no plan exists to use it, **delete it**.

Decision rule: `grep -r "NodeLike" --include="*.rs" /media/mukund-thiru/SanthData/Santh/`
outside vyre. Zero external hits → delete. Any external hit → keep +
doctest.

**A.10.5 — `vyre-spec` invariant names reference non-existent conform test files**

`vyre-spec/src/invariants.rs` lists invariants by test-file-path that
no longer exist on disk. Broken pointer set.

Fix:
- Run `for path in $(grep -oE '"\\S+\\.rs"' vyre-spec/src/invariants.rs); do test -f "$path" || echo MISSING $path; done`
- For each missing path: either the test moved (update path) or the
  test was deleted (delete the invariant entry). Never: document as
  "known missing." LAW 9.
- Add CI gate `scripts/check_invariant_paths_exist.sh` that runs the
  same check and fails if any path is missing.

**A.10.6 — Reference interpreter simulates GPU workgroups**

`vyre-reference/src/workgroup.rs` (502 lines) runs its own scheduler.
`sequential.rs` is the correct model for a pure CPU oracle.
`workgroup.rs`'s `LocalSlots::visit_nodes`/`visit_expr` (`:144-241`)
have `_ => {}` wildcards on Expr/Node matches that silently miss new
`Opaque` variants — a correctness bug, not just a style issue.

This file is in `vyre-reference/`, not `vyre-foundation/`. Agent A owns
it because it interacts with the foundation IR + visitor traits:
- Rewrite `LocalSlots::visit_nodes` and `visit_expr` using the new
  `ExprVisitor`/`NodeVisitor` traits from Task A.1.
- Eliminate the scheduler simulation — the oracle runs programs
  sequentially; workgroup invocation identity (the `InvocationIds` type)
  stays as a pure data carrier, but there is no `Frame::{Nodes, Loop}`
  state machine.
- `Memory` uses `HashMap<String, Buffer>` on hot path. Intern buffer
  names to `u32 BufferId` at Program-compile time and replace with
  `SmallVec<[(BufferId, Buffer); 8]>` (typical program has ≤ 8 buffers).

Acceptance: every test in `vyre-reference/tests/` continues to pass.
Bench `vyre-reference/benches/eval_bench.rs` shows ≥ 2× speedup on
the small-program case (string-keyed HashMap was the hot-path slowdown).

**A.10.7 — `vyre-primitives/` deletion**

Not Agent C's — it's foundation-adjacent. The `vyre-primitives` crate
was removed from the workspace diff but the directory still exists on
disk. Agent A deletes:
```
git rm -rf vyre-primitives/
```
Plus removes from workspace `Cargo.toml`:
- `"vyre-primitives",` from `[workspace] members`
- `vyre-primitives = { ... }` from `[workspace.dependencies]`
- `vyre-primitives = { ... }` from `[patch.crates-io]`

### Task A.11 — No TODOs, no stubs, no evasion

- No `todo!()`, `unimplemented!()`, `panic!("not implemented")` in any
  moved file.
- No `// TODO` / `// FIXME` / `// HACK` markers added.
- Existing tests keep their assertions; no weakening.
- No documentation claiming something is "not yet supported" — if
  something was supported before the move, it must be supported after.

## Commit message

```
vyre §A: extract vyre-foundation crate from vyre-core

Moves ir/, visit/, serial/, validate/, memory_model, extension/, engine/,
transform/, optimizer/, lower, match_result, cpu_op, cpu_references into
a new vyre-foundation crate. Zero dependencies on naga/wgpu/toml.

Moves IntrinsicDescriptor from vyre-core/ops/metadata.rs to vyre-spec.
Fixes 7 reverse imports in ir/transform/compiler/ to pull AlgebraicLaw
and IntrinsicDescriptor from vyre-spec instead of crate::ops.

Deletes vyre-core/src/ir/engine/token_match_filter.rs (moves to vyre-ops
by Agent C).

vyre-core re-exports everything moved; all downstream consumers
(surgec, pyrograph, warpscan, vyre-wgpu, conform/*) compile unchanged.

Part of the v0.6 restructure per .internals/planning/COMPUTE_2_0.md.
```

## Done when

1. `vyre-foundation` crate exists with all listed subtrees.
2. `cargo build -p vyre-foundation` succeeds with the constrained dep set.
3. `cargo build -p vyre` succeeds.
4. `cargo test -p vyre-foundation` passes.
5. `cargo test -p vyre` passes at pre-restructure test counts.
6. `scripts/check_trait_freeze.sh` passes.
7. `scripts/check_no_string_wgsl.sh` count unchanged (Law B not worsened).
8. No reverse imports remain in `vyre-core/src/ir/` (verified by `grep`).
9. `vyre-core/src/ir/` directory no longer exists.
10. `vyre-core/src/ir/transform/compiler/wgsl/` left intact for Agent B
    to claim (per Task A.7).
11. Wire-format corpus diff (Task A.8) is empty — not a single byte of
    divergence.
12. `CompilerPrimitiveShaderProvider` trait exists in
    `vyre-foundation/src/transform/compiler/shader_provider.rs`.
13. `Expr::Opaque` and `Node::Opaque` round-trip through the wire
    format (proptest passes).
14. `RuleCondition::Opaque(Arc<dyn RuleConditionExt>)` exists in
    `vyre-spec` with frozen-trait snapshot.
15. `grep "match \\(expr\\|node\\)" vyre-foundation/src/transform/`
    returns zero hits on Expr/Node-typed matches.
16. `NodeLike` trait resolution: kept with doctest OR deleted per the
    rule in Task A.10.4. Committed.
17. `vyre-spec/src/invariants.rs` has zero dangling path references;
    `scripts/check_invariant_paths_exist.sh` green.
18. `vyre-reference/src/workgroup.rs` no longer simulates a scheduler;
    `Memory` uses interned `BufferId` keys.
19. `vyre-primitives/` crate deleted from disk and workspace config.
20. Single commit pushed to main.
